title: acaena alpina
intro: Acaena alpina, also known as woolly cat's ear or woolly button, is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Acaena alpina are thought to include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Acaena alpina are typically made from the leaves and stems, and can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
